attributes.action: New legislation for ponds to have safety measures to prevent access by children
attributes.additional_details:
This petition is inspired by the loss of our 18 month old son, Harry. Since this happened, I have become increasingly aware of incidents involving children drowning in the UK.
 
Children are losing their lives in preventable pond accidents. While parents and carers do everything they can, it is common for toddlers to wander. Risks must be minimised.
 
Other countries have introduced safety laws for private water hazards.
 
We believe England should take steps to help prevent further tragedies.
attributes.background:
Introduce legislation requiring all domestic garden ponds to have at least one appropriate safety measure in place to prevent accidental access by young children.
 - This could include:
- Secure fencing or barriers
- Rigid pond covers or metal grids
- Raised or otherwise secured pond designs

departments.name: Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs
